artPrompt: A car-sized mutant bullfrog mid-lunge, gargantuan throat swelling and jaws yawning wide in extreme foreshortened close-up, sticky tongue lashing toward the viewer. Murky-green warty hide glistens with toxic slime; rusted pipes and overgrown concrete loom behind under a bruised stormy sky, sickly bioluminescence pulsing along its bulging gullet, a thunderous croak frozen mid-gulp, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Mutant Bullfrog
text: When Mutant Bullfrog enters the battlefield, it eats target creature with power 1 or less. (One gulp. No regrets. It is the size of a car now.)
flavorText: The croak rattles windows three blocks from the water.
